ui.runshop.title: Run Shop
ui.runshop.modifiers.title: Modifiers
ui.runshop.modifiers.description: Choose one of the following modifiers to apply to your next run. Modifiers provide various benefits or drawbacks on your descent.
ui.runshop.modifiers.maxhp.title: Max HP
ui.runshop.modifiers.goldgain.title: Gold Gain
ui.runshop.modifiers.goldgain.descriptio: Increase the amount of gold gained
ui.runshop.modifiers.startinggold.title: Starting Gold
ui.runshop.modifiers.startinggold.descri: Start each run with +10g additional gold
ui.runshop.modifiers.startinggoldbonus.d: Increase the starting gold bonus by 10g
Increase the starting relic bonus count by 1
ui.runshop.modifiers.hireally.title: Hire Ally
ui.runshop.modifiers.hireally.descriptio: Start the run with an ally that will fight alongside you
